title: SQLite Tutorial
description: Learn SQL fundamentals with hands-on SQLite exercises — from syntax basics through joins, schema design, and security.

modules.title: Getting Started
modules.description: What SQL and SQLite are, basic syntax, and your first query.

modules.title: SELECT Basics
modules.description: Retrieve data with SELECT, DISTINCT, aliases, and LIMIT.

modules.title: Filtering & Sorting
modules.description: Filter rows with WHERE, combine conditions, and sort results.

modules.title: Modifying Data
modules.description: Insert, update, and delete rows. Work with NULL values.

modules.title: Aggregate Functions
modules.description: Summarize data with COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX.

modules.title: Pattern Matching & Ranges
modules.description: Filter with LIKE, wildcards, IN, and BETWEEN.

modules.title: Joins
modules.description: Combine tables with INNER, LEFT, and self joins.

modules.title: GROUP BY & HAVING
modules.description: Group rows and filter aggregated results.

modules.title: Advanced Queries
modules.description: UNION, subqueries, EXISTS, and CASE expressions.

modules.title: Null Handling
modules.description: COALESCE, IFNULL, and null-handling patterns in SQLite.

modules.title: Database & Tables
modules.description: Create databases and tables, alter schema, and data types.

modules.title: Constraints & Keys
modules.description: NOT NULL, UNIQUE, primary keys, foreign keys, and CHECK.

modules.title: Indexes & Views
modules.description: Speed up queries with indexes and simplify access with views.

modules.title: Security Best Practices
modules.description: SQL injection risks and parameterized query patterns.
